title: thelypteris divergens
intro: Thelypteris divergens, also known as the fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, improving wound healing, and protecting against oxidative stress. Thelypteris divergens can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and its herbal preparations are used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions.
